title: Reusable settings dialog shell in @beskid/ui-react
body:
Shared settings framework in `@beskid/ui-react/settings`: registry API, nav search, form renderer, global save. Tracker replaces BoardSyncDrawer with gear-icon SettingsDialog.

## What shipped

- Settings registry + SettingsDialog in beskid_web_common
- Tracker sections: GitHub sync, catalog import, data management
- Vite alias for local dev against unpublished package
- GitHub Packages publish tracked separately in `ui-react-settings-gh-packages-publish`

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`ee88edf`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/ee88edf)
- **Completed:** 2026-06-07

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.4
- **Workstream:** `web-auth-web-common`
- **Deliverable:** `v04-platform-dx`
